projects.name: Building Han-Nom dictionary software in desktop
projects.description: Built a Han Nom dictionary software using Python and PyQt6, featuring lookup, root search, stroke writing, and conversion. Collected and converted data from JSON, designed processing flowcharts, and labeled image data to enhance search accuracy and efficiency. Improved GUI programming, data organization, and practical search system building skills.

projects.name: Machine Learning for classification problem
projects.description: Implemented a complete classification process using the White Wine Quality dataset from UCI. Performed data preprocessing (cleaning, normalizing, type transformation) and built various classification models including Logistic Regression, KNN, Random Forest, and SVM to classify wines into 'good' or 'bad' categories. Enhanced data preprocessing skills and understanding of the machine learning process from EDA to model evaluation.
